# SDP - CMDB (v1 legacy) — action docs

One page per action of the [`sdp-cmdb-v1`](../README.md) connector: every parameter explained, plus copy-paste `input_data` variations. These pages are the targets of each operation's **Learn more** link (`externalDocs` + the description suffix in the definition).

| Action | Operation ID | Endpoint | Doc |
|---|---|---|---|
| Count all CIs | `CountAllCIs` | `GET /api/cmdb/ci/count/all` | [count-all-cis.md](count-all-cis.md) |
| Get CI relationships | `GetCIRelationships` | `GET /api/cmdb/cirelationships/{ci_name}` | [get-ci-relationships.md](get-ci-relationships.md) |
| List all CIs | `ListAllCIs` | `GET /api/cmdb/ci/list/all` | [list-all-cis.md](list-all-cis.md) |
| Modify CI relationships | `ModifyCIRelationships` | `POST /api/cmdb/cirelationships` | [modify-ci-relationships.md](modify-ci-relationships.md) |
